title: Kazz
content:
{{Top|fa|leg}} {{Otheruses|Kaz}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image=[[File:Kazz_portrait.jpg]] |name=Kazz |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]{{Ewoks|Battle for the Sunstar}} |gender= |pronouns=He/him{{CSWECite|II|205|Kazz, Admiral}} |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Brown]] |feathers= |eyes=Black |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] **[[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|To search a primitive world for a magic stone guarded by furry warriors called 'Ewoks.' Ha! No one believes that! It's just one more of your foolish ideas!|Admiral Kazz, to Doctor Raygar, on the latter's mission for the Sunstar|}} '''Kazz''' was an [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] [[Imperial officer/Legends|officer]] who served since the early [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]], which was established in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]. He was an [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] by [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. A [[Human/Legends|Human]], he was in command of an [[Doctor Raygar's Star Destroyer|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] in 3 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]] that took the [[Argazdan/Legends|Argazdan]] known as Doctor [[Raygar]] to the [[Forest/Legends|Forest]] [[Moon/Legends|Moon]] of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]], where the [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] hoped to find the [[Sunstar/Legends|Sunstar]], a gem with [[Magic/Legends|magical]] powers, for [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. Despite Kazz's incredulity about the Sunstar's supposed powers or even existence, the venture was successful in that Raygar stole the Sunstar from its guardians, a group of [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]]. Nevertheless, Raygar refused to show the gem to anyone but the Emperor, who was already on his way to the [[Endor system/Legends|Endor system]]. When Raygar's [[Droid/Legends|droid]] servant, [[PD-28]], arrived on the [[Destroyer/Legends|destroyer]] in an [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]], Kazz dismissed the droid's claim that he had escaped capture by the Ewoks. Kazz ordered the droid to be recycled, not knowing that PD-28 had [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggled]] a group of Ewoks onto the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] to recover their lost gem. As Kazz manned the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer's]] [[Bridge (starship)/Legends|command bridge]], Raygar attempted to use the Sunstar's power to [[Death/Legends|kill]] Palpatine aboard the [[Emperor's personal shuttle/Legends|Emperor's shuttle]] and take control of the Empire. However, the plot was thwarted by the Ewoks, who took the Sunstar and escaped from the destroyer back to Endor. Raygar's betrayal now revealed, Kazz had the [[Academician|academic]] arrested for [[Treason/Legends|high treason]] against the Empire. The admiral, who had not seen the Ewoks or the Sunstar, believed that Raygar had fabricated the story of the magical artifact as part of his treachery; accordingly, the admiral handed the Argazdan over to the Emperor's custody for punishment. ==Biography== ===Admiral in the Empire=== {{Quote|I cannot believe there's anything on that backwater planet that could be of use to the Galactic Empire.''"
"''What you believe does not interest me, Admiral Kazz. The Emperor himself has approved my expedition.|Kazz and Raygar, arguing over their mission to Endor|}} [[File:RaygarKazz.png|thumb|left|250px|Kazz did not hide his doubts about the mission to Endor from Raygar.]] Kazz was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] as a [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Navy]] [[Imperial officer/Legends|officer]] since the early [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]], which had been [[Declaration of a New Order|declared]]{{Film|III}} in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]].''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of {{Film|III}} to [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]. By [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],{{EwoksDate|appearance of Kazz|[[Battle for the Sunstar]]}} he was a Navy admiral. In 3 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]], [[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] [[Raygar]], an [[Argazdan/Legends|Argazdan]]{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/fiction/feature20090531/index.html?page=1|text=Death in the Slave Pits of Lorrd: A Hyperspace Exclusive|int=Death in the Slave Pits of Lorrd}} [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] affiliated with the Empire, sought to launch an [[Battle of Bright Tree Village (Imperial-Ewok War)|expedition]] to the [[Forest/Legends|Forest]] [[Moon/Legends|Moon]] of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]], where the [[Sunstar/Legends|Sunstar]], a gem with [[Magic/Legends|supernatural]] powers, was rumored to be located. After the [[Academician|academic's]] planned mission gained the approval of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], Kazz, in command of an [[Doctor Raygar's Star Destroyer|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]], was assigned to escort Raygar to Endor. Highly skeptical about the very existence of the Sunstar and its supposed guardians, known as [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]], Kazz believed that Raygar's plan was just another foolish idea from the scholar, whom Kazz openly despised. He nonetheless received Raygar aboard the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] and brought him to the [[Endor system/Legends|Endor system]][[Star Wars: Empire at War: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Empire at War'': Prima Official Game Guide]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]'' ===Mission to Endor=== {{Quote|I have recovered the Sunstar as promised. But I will present it only to the Emperor.''"
"''As you wish. The Emperor is on his way here now. But for your sake, Doctor, that trinket of yours had better be as powerful as you say.|Raygar and Kazz|}} [[File:KazzRecycles.png|thumb|right|250px|Unimpressed by PD-28's performance, Kazz ordered the droid to be recycled.]] Kazz maintained his suspicion of Raygar and his mission up to the very moment the Argazdan scientist departed the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] for the forest moon in his [[Raygar's freighter|freighter]] with a team of [[Imperial Reconnaissance Droid|large droids]] and a smaller [[Droid/Legends|droid]] servant, [[PD-28]]. Nevertheless, Raygar eventually returned to the Star Destroyer and claimed that his mission had proven a success, and refused to show the Sunstar to anyone but Palpatine himself. Kazz revealed the [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] was already on his way to the Endor system to examine the artifact. Kazz next dealt with an Imperial [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]] that approached the [[Destroyer/Legends|destroyer]] from the moon. Its [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] identified himself as Raygar's droid, PD-28, who claimed that he was returning to serve his master. In truth, the droid had defected from the Empire and was now helping the Ewoks retrieve their stolen Sunstar. Unaware that the pod contained four Ewoks, Kazz allowed the pod to land in the destroyer's [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]]. The small droid told Kazz that he had been captured by Ewoks and managed to escape with the pod—a falsehood. The admiral scolded the small droid for incompetence for being captured in the first place, and he ordered a larger droid to take PD-28 to be recycled. ===The Emperor's arrival=== {{Quote|There never was a Sunstar! It was all part of your traitorous plot.''"
"''What will you do to me?''"
"''Nothing. The Emperor is going to punish you himself.|Kazz and Raygar|}} [[File:KazzWTFface.png|thumb|left|250px|Shaken by the attempt on Palpatine's life, Kazz commanded the attacker to be detained.]] Meanwhile, Doctor Raygar decided to [[Assassin/Legends|assassinate]] Palpatine with the Sunstar's unlimited energy and take his place as the new Emperor. With the gem, he swiftly constructed a [[Cannon/Legends|cannon]] that used the Sunstar as its power source. However, [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|one]] of the Ewoks attacked Raygar, and during the scuffle, the Argazdan accidentally launched the cannon. The blast grazed [[Emperor's personal shuttle/Legends|Emperor Palpatine's shuttle]], which was just landing in the destroyer. Kazz was appalled by the attack and ordered three [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] to find and arrest the unknown assailant. The Ewoks were able to reclaim the Sunstar from Raygar and left the Star Destroyer in the same escape pod in which they had arrived. Raygar tried to give chase, but he was halted and arrested by the [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] Kazz had sent and was taken to the admiral, who waited in the hangar. Kazz charged the scholar with high treason against the Galactic Empire for his attempted assassination of the Emperor. Raygar's protests failed to sway the admiral, as Kazz had not witnessed the Ewoks aboard the ship, nor even seen the Sunstar; Kazz concluded that the Sunstar had never existed, and that it had been nothing more than a part of Raygar's treacherous plot to [[Death/Legends|kill]] the Emperor. As Palpatine's damaged shuttle landed in the hangar, Kazz turned his captive over to face the consequences of his treason. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|If you were a proper Imperial droid, you never would have allowed yourself to be captured in the first place! Take this worthless lump and have it recycled into something useful.|Kazz, on PD-28|}} [[File:KazzWithStormtroopers.png|thumb|right|250px|Admiral Kazz's loyalties belonged to the Galactic Empire.]] As an admiral in the Imperial Navy, Kazz was loyal to Emperor Palpatine. He was shocked upon the discovery that Raygar was plotting to eliminate the Emperor, and he had the scientist arrested immediately. He took pleasure in informing Raygar about his impending punishment, and he ignored the academic's pleas for mercy. Kazz looked down upon those whose usefulness to the Empire he doubted. Kazz dismissed Doctor Raygar's mission for the Sunstar as fanciful, and he scolded the Argazdan about the frivolity of the plan. Similarly, when PD-28 claimed he had been captured by Ewoks, Kazz believed that a proper Imperial droid would never have suffered such an fate; accordingly, he called the droid useless and ordered him to be recycled into something more worthwhile. Kazz also questioned Endor's importance to the Empire, erroneously referring to the forest moon as a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. Kazz was not a superstitious man. He believed the magical Sunstar was just a foolish idea of Raygar's imagination, even though the Emperor had approved the scientist's search for the gem. Kazz made his opinions clear to Raygar, and he warned the Argazdan of the fate that would befall him if the Sunstar's powers were exaggerated. After Raygar's plot to seize power failed, Kazz concluded that the gem had indeed been a hoax. Kazz had [[Color/Legends|brown]] hair and black [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. ==Equipment== Kazz wore an olive-gray [[Imperial military uniforms/Legends|Imperial military uniform]] and [[Hat/Legends|cap]]. The suit included his [[Rank insignia plaque/Legends|rank insignia]], which consisted of two [[Code cylinder/Legends|code cylinders]] and three blue squares above three red squares, a pattern that contrasted with the standard rank insignia of the Empire's other admirals.[[Imperial Sourcebook (Second Edition)|''Imperial Sourcebook'', Second Edition]] During his [[Time/Legends|time]] in the Endor system, Kazz was often accompanied by an escort, which consisted of either Imperial stormtroopers or one of the large droids. ==Behind the scenes== Admiral Kazz first appeared in "[[Battle for the Sunstar]]," the twentieth episode in the [[Ewoks: Season Two|second season]] of the animated television series [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']], which first aired on [[December 6]], [[1986]].{{InsiderCite|27|A Star Wars CELibration|A ''Star Wars'' CELibration}} While the spelling of the character's name was ambiguous in the episode, [[Leland Chee]] confirmed in a message on [[StarWars.com]] that the name is spelled "Kazz."{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=158725&start=0&tstart=0.html#15923277|thread=Spelling Discrepancies|author=[[Leland Chee|Leland Y Chee]]|date=2006-11-13|time=12:16 PM}} ==Appearances== *{{Ewoks|Battle for the Sunstar}} {{1st}} ==Sources== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Kazz}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Kazz |nl=Kazz }} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Imperial Navy admirals of the Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]]
